title: Add SQLite migration harness and source ingestion
problem: The scaffold has a schema placeholder but no way to create the database or persist sources. Phase 1 needs a migration harness that applies rge/db/schema.sql (reconciled with the claims-lifecycle representation in docs/agents/05_DATA_MODEL.md) and a 'research ingest' command that persists a fixture source with chunks, checksum, and status per Golden Test 1.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 1: source ingestion creates durable source records.

agent_reports/2026-06-11_phase-0_ticket-001_repo-scaffold-model-runtime.md: schema placeholder uses claims_staged/claims_accepted/claim_rejections while 05_DATA_MODEL.md models a single claims table with status; reconciliation needed before ingestion lands.
acceptance_criteria: A migration harness creates the SQLite database from versioned migration files.
Schema reconciles the claim lifecycle with 05_DATA_MODEL.md (single claims table with status, plus claim_quotes), preserving rejection reasons.

research ingest fixtures/sources/creativity_ai_diversity_short.txt --domain creativity persists one sources record and at least one chunks record with stable IDs, checksum, timestamps, and status 'ingested'.
The source can be re-read after process restart.
Existing golden scaffold tests still pass.
non_goals: Do not implement claim extraction or validation.
Do not implement concept linking, relationships, or scoring.
Do not implement URL/PDF fetching beyond local text files.
Do not touch the public site or export logic.
rollback_plan: Revert the ticket branch; delete any locally created data/db/*.sqlite file. Schema changes live only in migration files, so reverting the branch restores the previous schema state.
